---
description: "Use when writing or reviewing Markdown files. Covers heading style, formatting conventions, and structure."
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown style guide

## Headings

- Use **sentence case** — capitalize only the first word and proper nouns
- Do not use bold or other emphasis inside headings
- Use ATX style (`#`) only; no underline-style headings

```markdown
<!-- Correct -->
# Project setup guide
## Getting started
### Environment variables

<!-- Incorrect -->
# Project Setup Guide
## Getting Started
### Environment Variables
```
